name: to-do
description: Date-routed daily to-do notes feeding SpaceDailyDashboard's tasks panel under spice/to-do/. v0.1.2: filename pattern <Name>-YYYY-MM-DD (filename_prefix "ToDo-") per v0.4.2 platform invariant. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.58.0 FA-6): canonical-vocab adoption per Frontmatter Alignment. Template now emits type: "to-do" + canonical created_at: (ISO+TZ; replaces legacy created:). Discriminator tag todo stripped; temporal YYYY/MM/DD tag stripped. NEW canonical-vocab rule_fragment. v0.3.0 MINOR (v0.63.0): All-To-Dos aggregator at spice/to-do/All-ToDos.md (live Dataview, uncompleted tasks from prior days grouped by source date, excludes today); Migrate-to-tomorrow dialog (modal task picker; selected tasks + indented children moved from today to tomorrow's note, creating tomorrow from template if absent). Adds 2 nav-buttons (todo-all + todo-migrate) + 4 CustomJS classes (ToDoHubActions, ToDoAllList, ToDoMigrateModal, ToDoMigrateInit) + 1 startup-init script (ToDoMigrateInit registers sauce:to-do-migrate command via customjs_startup_scripts[]). Rule-fragment scope tightened from spice/to-do/**/*.md to spice/to-do/**/ToDo-*.md so the new All-ToDos.md hub isn't validated against the daily-note naming pattern.

post_install.message: To-do blueprint v0.3.0 installed at spice/to-do/. Daily note: click 'To Do' nav-button to create today's file. NEW: 'All To-Dos' nav-button opens spice/to-do/All-ToDos.md showing uncompleted tasks from prior days; 'Migrate' nav-button opens a dialog to move unchecked tasks to tomorrow.
